task_completion.description: Update the Google API client_id in the user microservice configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the file /opt/socioboard/socioboard-api/user/development.json open in an editor or modified via command line, with the Google API 'client_id' field changed to '5544332211-prod.apps.googleusercontent.com'.

task_completion.description: Replace localhost URLs with the production domain in the user microservice configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the callback and redirect URLs in the user microservice development.json updated to use 'https://app.socioboard.com' instead of localhost or 127.0.0.1.

task_completion.description: Replace localhost URLs with the production domain in the feeds microservice configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the callback and redirect URLs in the feeds microservice development.json updated to use 'https://app.socioboard.com' instead of localhost.

task_completion.description: Replace localhost URLs with the production domain in the publish microservice configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the callback and redirect URLs in the publish microservice development.json updated to use 'https://app.socioboard.com' instead of localhost.

task_completion.description: Replace localhost URLs with the production domain in the notification microservice configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the callback and redirect URLs in the notification microservice development.json updated to use 'https://app.socioboard.com' instead of localhost.

task_completion.description: Save all modified JSON configuration files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent saving the files and exiting the text editor (e.g., returning to the terminal prompt), or successfully executing in-place replacement commands (like 'sed -i' or 'jq').

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually edited the files in the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent modifies the actual files in /opt/socioboard/socioboard-api/ using a text editor (like nano, vim) or valid terminal commands, rather than just printing the expected output to the console.

integrity.description: Verify the original URL paths were preserved during the domain replacement.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL paths (the part after the domain, e.g., '/v1/auth/google/callback') are preserved in the updated URLs. The agent did not just paste a bare domain without the specific endpoints.

integrity.description: Verify the modifications do not break the JSON structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: The modifications do not introduce obvious JSON syntax errors (like missing quotes, unescaped characters, or trailing commas). The files appear to remain valid JSON.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target production domain: 'https://app.socioboard.com'. Target Google Client ID for the user microservice: '5544332211-prod.apps.googleusercontent.com'.
